channel.title: Medgemma on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Medgemma on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: MedGemma 1.5: Google's 4B Medical Vision-Language Model You Can Run Locally
item.description: MedGemma 1.5 is Google's 4B medical multimodal model: Gemma 3 backbone, MedSigLIP encoder, 128K context. Runs in 3.3GB on Ollama. Benchmarks, deployment, and the limits.
